results.name: aether
results.description: A blue energy found throughout the multiverse. Very common on Kaladesh.

results.name: affinity
results.description: Affinity is an ability that reduces the mana cost of the spell by the number of permanents of a specified type that the player controls. Variations of this ability exist, such as referencing the number of cards in the players' graveyard or the number of attacking creatures.

results.name: affinity for domain
results.description: Affinity reducers that care about the range of land types you control.

results.name: affinity for land type
results.description: Affinity abilities that care about land types.

results.name: affinity for spells
results.description: Costs 1 less to cast for each instant or sorcery card in your graveyard

results.name: affinity undergrowth
results.description: Affinity which cares about how many creatures are in your graveyard.

results.name: afflict
results.description: An ability that makes defending players lose life for blocking. It exists primarily as a keyword although variants that mimic the mechanic exists.

results.name: after battle
results.description: Scenes where a battle has been fought, and seems to have ended or reached a pause.

results.description: A tradition that almost died out when the Fire Nation wiped out the Air Nomads, leaving Aang as the eponymous Last Airbender.
